chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1588 of 2020 CP D 6297 of 2019 CP D 819 of 2020 CP D 871 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 7255/2020 2. For hearing of main case 10.02.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhabat Hussain Awan, advocate for respondent Mr. Asif Hussain advocate holds brief for Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for respondent Mr. Zohaib Korai advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Mr. Nadir Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Mr. Javaid Hussain advocate holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Mr. Tahir Khalil advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that all these petitions may be disposed of with directions to the respondents to finalize the assessment vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Respective learned counsel for respondents articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
